summary: Tested Summary Bias Experiment pipeline - all backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. 150 summaries (50 papers × 3 models), 1800 evaluations (200 matches × 9 configs) completed. All data-testid elements render correctly with proper data.
passed_tests: GET /api/summary-bias/results?category=q-bio.BM returns status=ok with all required fields
Results contain grid_consensus (3x3 array), grid_original (3x3 array)
Results contain judges array with 3 items: Claude Opus, Gemini 3, GPT 5.2
Results contain summarizers array with 3 items: Claude Opus, Gemini 3, GPT 5.2
Results contain self_bias with own_summary_rate, other_summary_avg, bias for each model
Results contain judge_consistency and summary_influence with correct structure
Sidebar shows Experiments section with Summary Bias item (data-testid='nav-exp-summary-bias')
Clicking Summary Bias shows SummaryBiasSection component (data-testid='summary-bias-section')
Two heatmap grids render (data-testid='heatmap-grid') - consensus and original match results
Self-bias cards render for all 3 models with correct data (data-testid='bias-card-*')
Judge consistency section shows bars for all 3 models (data-testid='judge-consistency')
Summary influence section shows bars for all 3 models (data-testid='summary-influence')
Experiment description box explains the 3 judges × 3 summary sources methodology
seed_data_creation: None - pipeline already completed with 150 summaries and 1800 match evaluations in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Summary Bias Experiment feature complete. Backend router at /api/summary-bias with status and results endpoints. Frontend component SummaryBiasSection.jsx renders under Experiments section in ValidationHubPage sidebar. Data-testids: nav-exp-summary-bias, summary-bias-section, heatmap-grid, self-bias-section, bias-card-{Model}, judge-consistency, summary-influence, summary-stats. Pipeline data: q-bio.BM category, 50 papers, 150 summaries (3 models), 200 matches, 1800 evaluations (9 configs each).

frontend_elements.heatmap_grids: 2 grids - consensus and original match results
frontend_elements.self_bias_cards: 3 cards for Claude Opus, Gemini 3, GPT 5.2
frontend_elements.consistency_bars: Judge Consistency and Summary Influence sections
